productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Woven Blue Shorts
description: Style Note Girls will love these denim skirts from gini and jony. Team them with a T-shirt and sandals, and she can play in comfort. Product Details Blue washed denim skirt with two side pockets with a coin pocket on the right side, two back pockets, button and zippered front closure, has comfortable waistband with belt loops Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embroidery
